item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Sentencing Reform
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Federal Sentencing Reform

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal sentencing reform legislation in the 119th Congress, building on the 2018 First Step Act with additional reentry, mandatory-minimum, and sentencing-disparity provisions.

What does it actually do?

  • Mandatory-minimum reform for specific drug offenses
  • Crack-powder cocaine sentencing parity
  • Compassionate-release expansion
  • Reentry-program funding
  • Pell Grant restoration for incarcerated students (composing with FAFSA)

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with Save-the-World Paper 10 (Universal Justice — Federal-Congressional Body Cam doctrine) and #5 The Family Table (incarcerated family member is a Trust Graph node like any other).
